title: Assessment
subtitle: 6 relationship areas
no_couple_desc: The assessment is taken together — each partner answers independently
completed_desc: Your answers are saved. Results will appear when your partner completes their assessment.
intro_desc: 40 questions, ~15 minutes. Each partner answers independently. AI builds a shared profile.
privacy_note: Your answers are visible only to you
start_privacy: Your answers are private until both partners finish
toast_both_done: Both done! Results are being prepared...
toast_save_error: Couldn't save your answer — please try again
